series_metadata.series_description: Included are grant applications, budget revisions and related materials generated or maintained by the Adult Basic Literacy Education (ABLE) staff and pertaining to the ABLE grant program.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Maintain from final expenditure report of each approved fiscal year’s grant project, or as required by federal law whichever is longer. ; Electronic: Maintain from final expenditure report of each approved fiscal year’s grant project, or as required by federal law whichever is longer
